source: Library of Congress, Historic American Buildings Survey (HABS)
title: St. Nicholas Russian Orthodox Church, Hoonah, Alaska — interior
description: Interior color photograph of St. Nicholas Russian Orthodox Church in Hoonah, documented by the Historic American Buildings Survey. Shows the blue-painted ceiling, iconostasis, and sanctuary. The Orthodox presence in Hoonah dates to the 19th century and reflects the historic Russian mission to Southeast Alaska.
alt: Interior of St. Nicholas Russian Orthodox Church in Hoonah with blue ceiling and iconostasis
